channel.title: NYT > Technology
channel.description: Technology industry news, commentary, and analysis, with reporting on big tech, startups, and internet culture. The New York Times is a hub for conversation about news and ideas.

item.title: IBM Unveils New Method to Make Smaller Computer Chip Parts
item.description: Industry leaders had worried that innovations in chip miniaturization were no longer possible.
item.dc:creator: Don Clark

media:content.media:credit: Bryan Derballa for The New York Times
media:content.media:description: A silicon wafer full of microchips at the IBM research facility in Albany, N.Y. Industry analysts briefed on an IBM announcement were impressed, while noting that the approach would face competition.
